tools.name: get_health_context
tools.description: Retrieves expert health information about nutrition, disease prevention, fitness training, or longevity (LEV - longevity escape velocity). Searches a curated knowledge base of evidence-based research and returns relevant facts and actionable ideas. Example queries: 'benefits of omega-3 fatty acids', 'exercises for lower back pain', 'intermittent fasting effects on longevity', 'vitamin D deficiency symptoms'. Do not use this for emergency medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment recommendations.
